every-5-minutes.title: Cron Job For: Every 5 minutes (*/5 * * * *)

every-hour.title: Cron Job For: Every hour at minute 0 (0 * * * *)

every-2-hours.title: Cron Job For: Every 2 hours (0 */2 * * *)
every-2-hours.description: Generate, validate, and parse the exact cron expression for every 2 hours. Use our visualizer to test the syntax 0 */2 * * *.

at-midnight-every-day.title: Cron Job For: Every day at midnight (0 0 * * *)

at-1am-every-day.title: Cron Job For: Every day at 1:00 AM (0 1 * * *)

at-2am-every-day.title: Cron Job For: Every day at 2:00 AM (0 2 * * *)

at-5am-on-sundays.title: Cron Job For: Every Sunday at 5:00 AM (0 5 * * 0)

every-first-of-month.title: Cron Job For: First day of every month at midnight (0 0 1 * *)
every-first-of-month.description: Generate, validate, and parse the exact cron expression for first day of every month at midnight. Use our visualizer to test the syntax 0 0 1 * *.

every-weekday-at-9am.title: Cron Job For: Monday through Friday at 9:00 AM (0 9 * * 1-5)
every-weekday-at-9am.description: Generate, validate, and parse the exact cron expression for monday through friday at 9:00 am. Use our visualizer to test the syntax 0 9 * * 1-5.
